title: cilantro lime sauce

directions.step: Roast the jalapeños under the broiler in your oven, flipping every 2 minutes. Once slightly charred remove from the oven and finish with a blowtorch, completely charring the skin. If you don't have a blow torch you can continue to use the broiler.

directions: Set peppers in a metal bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let sit for 5 minutes.
Use a wet paper towel to remove the charred skin from the peppers. Use a knife to cut off the stems and remove the pith inside.

directions.step: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth. If you are using xanthan gum, whisk together the xanthan gum and oil until homogenous before combining with the other ingredients. This will prevent clumping.
